description: Main window: native save/open dialogs + fs access at dialog-granted paths. Note (M8.2): dialog picks extend the fs SCOPE at runtime (verified in tauri-plugin-dialog source), but fs:default carries no read/write COMMAND permissions outside app dirs — the explicit allow-read/write-text-file entries below are required. Dialog permissions are open+save only (M10.5): the app never uses ask/confirm/message, so dialog:default was broader than needed.
